task.en: Open the Contacts app and create a single new contact card with all of the following fields: First name `Mara`, Last name `Okonkwo`, Company (Organization) `Helix Robotics`, an email address `mara.okonkwo@helixrobotics.io` (any label is fine), and a phone number typed exactly as `+1 (415) 555-0186` (any label is fine). Save the card. Do not create any other contacts.

pre_command: killall Contacts 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; ABDIR="$HOME/Library/Application Support/AddressBook"; find "$ABDIR" -name '*.abcddb' 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r D; do sqlite3 "$D" "DELETE FROM ZABCDEMAILADDRESS WHERE ZOWNER IN (SELECT Z_PK FROM ZABCDRECORD WHERE ZFIRSTNAME='Mara' AND ZLASTNAME='Okonkwo'); DELETE FROM ZABCDPHONENUMBER WHERE ZOWNER IN (SELECT Z_PK FROM ZABCDRECORD WHERE ZFIRSTNAME='Mara' AND ZLASTNAME='Okonkwo'); DELETE FROM ZABCDRECORD WHERE ZFIRSTNAME='Mara' AND ZLASTNAME='Okonkwo'; PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);" >/dev/null 2>&1; done
grading_command: killall Contacts 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; ABDIR="$HOME/Library/Application Support/AddressBook"; SQL="SELECT count(*) FROM ZABCDRECORD WHERE Z_ENT=22 AND ZFIRSTNAME='Mara' AND ZLASTNAME='Okonkwo';"; find "$ABDIR" -name '*.abcddb' 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r D; do sqlite3 "$D" "PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);" >/dev/null 2>&1; sqlite3 "$D" "$SQL" 2>/dev/null; done | (S=0; while read n; do S=$((S+${n:-0})); done; [ "$S" -ge 1 ] && echo True || echo False)

killall Contacts 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; ABDIR="$HOME/Library/Application Support/AddressBook"; SQL="SELECT count(*) FROM ZABCDRECORD WHERE Z_ENT=22 AND ZFIRSTNAME='Mara' AND ZLASTNAME='Okonkwo' AND ZORGANIZATION='Helix Robotics';"; find "$ABDIR" -name '*.abcddb' 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r D; do sqlite3 "$D" "$SQL" 2>/dev/null; done | (S=0; while read n; do S=$((S+${n:-0})); done; [ "$S" -ge 1 ] && echo True || echo False)

killall Contacts 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; ABDIR="$HOME/Library/Application Support/AddressBook"; SQL="SELECT count(*) FROM ZABCDRECORD r JOIN ZABCDEMAILADDRESS e ON e.ZOWNER=r.Z_PK WHERE r.Z_ENT=22 AND r.ZFIRSTNAME='Mara' AND r.ZLASTNAME='Okonkwo' AND lower(e.ZADDRESS)='mara.okonkwo@helixrobotics.io';"; find "$ABDIR" -name '*.abcddb' 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r D; do sqlite3 "$D" "$SQL" 2>/dev/null; done | (S=0; while read n; do S=$((S+${n:-0})); done; [ "$S" -ge 1 ] && echo True || echo False)

killall Contacts 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; ABDIR="$HOME/Library/Application Support/AddressBook"; SQL="SELECT count(*) FROM ZABCDRECORD r JOIN ZABCDPHONENUMBER p ON p.ZOWNER=r.Z_PK WHERE r.Z_ENT=22 AND r.ZFIRSTNAME='Mara' AND r.ZLASTNAME='Okonkwo' AND replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(p.ZFULLNUMBER,'-',''),' ',''),'(',''),')',''),'+','')='14155550186';"; find "$ABDIR" -name '*.abcddb' 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r D; do sqlite3 "$D" "$SQL" 2>/dev/null; done | (S=0; while read n; do S=$((S+${n:-0})); done; [ "$S" -ge 1 ] && echo True || echo False)
